# Extracao: transcription_mp4_0__Introduction

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_0__Introduction.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT

---

I will prove to you here in these segments that price is almost never the reason people don't buy. And why and how to finally handle the price situation so that you quit giving up your price and quit giving your product away. You'll be introduced to the two things more important to every customer than price. You'll learn how to handle the price objection, how to justify your price and most importantly how to get your price.
